required_preferences.fact: Arrives at the corporate office downtown for frequent daytime cross-departmental meetings — no longer prepares for warehouse shift coordination

supersedes.fact: Arrives at the distribution center at 8:45am every weekday to prepare for daily in-person coordination meetings before shift begins

required_preferences.fact: Purchases pre-packaged healthy snacks from local supermarkets or shops to avoid unfamiliar vending machine options abroad — no longer preps snacks at home on Sundays

supersedes.fact: Preps healthy snack containers (nuts, fruit) on Sundays to resist warehouse junk food during long shifts

required_preferences.fact: Arranges quiet evening activities (reading, puzzles) for the household instead of TV or games, to accommodate his wife's mother's recovery needs
Performs a detailed nightly CPAP setup routine before bed, including checking mask fit and humidifier water level — does not skip even when tired or running late
Avoids evening naps or reclining in a recliner after dinner to ensure sleep pressure and maximize CPAP effectiveness at bedtime
Calls one close friend every Friday after work to catch up — never cancels without rescheduling

persona: A 45-year-old operations supervisor at a logistics firm
